WebhookPlatform._comment: Subscriptions seeded into outbox.WebhookSubscriptions on first run. EventType '*' matches every published event. Each event is delivered to BOTH endpoints — webhook.site shows it as outgoing, the loopback URL feeds the inbox.

LoopbackProvider._comment: Shared HMAC secret used by the inbox loopback receiver to verify outbox-signed deliveries. MUST equal the loopback subscription Secret above.
